intents.response: 🚀 Beat procrastination with the '2-minute rule': If a task takes less than 2 minutes, do it NOW. For bigger tasks, start with just 5 minutes — getting started is the hardest part. Try breaking your task into the smallest possible first step.

🍅 The Pomodoro Technique: Work for 25 minutes, then take a 5-minute break. After 4 sessions, take a longer 15-30 minute break. This boosts focus by creating urgency and preventing mental fatigue. Head to the Analytics tab to start your timer!

🧘 When overwhelmed: 1) Write down ALL tasks. 2) Pick ONLY 3 Most Important Tasks (MITs) for today. 3) Focus on ONE at a time. 4) Use the Eisenhower Matrix: Urgent+Important → Do Now, Not Urgent+Important → Schedule, Urgent+Not Important → Delegate, Rest → Delete.

😴 Sleep is the #1 productivity hack. Studies show 7-9 hours of sleep improves memory consolidation, decision-making, and creativity by up to 40%. Try to maintain a consistent sleep schedule and avoid screens 30 mins before bed.

📚 Effective study techniques: 1) Active Recall — test yourself instead of rereading. 2) Spaced Repetition — review after 1 day, 3 days, 1 week. 3) Feynman Technique — explain concepts in simple words. 4) Pomodoro sessions for focused study blocks.

⏰ Time Management Secrets: 1) Time-blocking: assign tasks to specific calendar blocks. 2) Eat the frog: do your hardest task FIRST each day. 3) Batch similar tasks together. 4) Limit email/messages to 2-3 scheduled check-ins per day.

🎯 SMART Goals framework: Make goals Specific, Measurable, Achievable, Relevant, and Time-bound. Use this app to create tasks with deadlines and let the AI schedule them for you. A weekly review every Sunday keeps you on track!

🎵 Background noise can improve focus for some! Low-volume, lyric-free music like Lofi or classical, or even brown noise, can block distracting sounds. Try embedding your favorite Spotify playlist right in the Pomodoro timer tab!

🔋 Stepping away is productive. During your 5 or 15 minute breaks, get away from screens entirely. Stretch, hydrate, look at something far away (the 20-20-20 rule), or take a short walk. Quality breaks equal quality focus!

👋 Hello! I'm your FocusFlow Brain (Local AI). I run completely offline and private on your machine. Ask me for productivity advice or type a task like 'Study for exams tomorrow at 5pm for 2 hours' to auto-schedule it!

fallback: 🤖 I'm the FocusFlow Brain! I'm still learning. Ask me about Focus techniques, Overcoming procrastination, Study strategies, Time management, Stress, or Sleep. You can also type a task command to auto-schedule it!
